task.question: What's the last piece black moves to deliver checkmate?
initial_trace_steps: I that a checkmate is delivered when a king cannot escape the attack from one or more opponent pieces through movement or capturing an attacking piece. As I watched the video and looked for this moment, I heard that the woman in yellow, playing black, said "Checkmate" at 03:35. I noticed that this move, knight to e2, only put the king in check. So I continued watching to see what black's final piece to move would be. At 03:45, I saw black move her queen to g1, but this still didn't put the king in checkmate because white was able to take the queen at 03:47. Then, black moved her second knight to f2, which delivered a checkmate on the king in h1. Therefore, I determined that the last piece black moves to deliver checkmate was a knight.
